subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of the Bayán! Hearken unto the call of this Prisoner, for He commandeth you that which God hath ordained in all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ملاء البیان اسمعوا ندآء  هذالمسجون  و انه یامرکم بما امر الله فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
